history.content: Hey Raul! What's up? What can I help you with?
can you go on my browser and go to X, and draft a post and send it to my telegram BEFORE you post it. Make the post abt prometheus
Done! I've sent the draft Prometheus post to your Telegram. Review it and let me know if you want changes or if I should post it to X as-is.
No i wanted to see you open up x and go to the composer and all of that no just send me the telegram message
Done! I've sent a screenshot of the X composer with your Prometheus post draft to Telegram. Review it there and let me know if you want any changes or if I should post it as-is.
